name: White Cake
recipeIngredient: 18 1/4 ozs Duncan Hines white cake mix
1 env Dream Whip whipped topping mix
7 1/4 ozs Betty Crocker Fluffy White Frosting Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 9 x 13" pan with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine cake mix, Dream Whip, and baking powder.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine water, egg whites, oil, and vanilla.
5. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened.
6. Bake for 40 minutes until golden brown.
7. To prepare frosting, follow directions on box.
8. Spread over cooled cake.
